_comment: PLACEHOLDER / SCHEMA EXAMPLE. The real file is (re)written by voices/generate_voices.py::run_batch on a GPU host. Each `voices.<id>` entry is {description, sample_line, ref_clip, clone_prompt_path, sample_rate, clone_prompt}. `clone_prompt` is null because the actual prompt is an opaque tensor blob stored out-of-line at `clone_prompt_path` (load via torch.load). `ref_clip` and `clone_prompt_path` are paths RELATIVE to the voices/ dir. Consumer handoff: see voices/README.md.

gm_narrator.description: A warm, theatrical storyteller and Game Master — rich mid-range, inviting and slightly wry, with confident dramatic timing. The default voice for all narration.
gm_narrator.sample_line: The rusted gate groans open, and beyond it the wasteland stretches out under a bruised and radiant sky. Roll for initiative, wanderers.

augusta_byron.description: A bright, articulate woman in her late 20s; crisp diction, measured and inquisitive, a faint clinical warmth and unshaken optimism.
augusta_byron.sample_line: Fascinating — the radiation readings spike near the old reactor. If my calculations hold, we can cross safely. Probably.

tommy_doyle.description: A smooth, fast-talking man in his mid-30s with a gambler's swagger; warm gravel, a grin you can hear, always working an angle.
tommy_doyle.sample_line: Relax, friend — I've talked my way out of worse than a few raiders. Tell you what, double or nothing on the caps?

bailey_bigsmile.description: A dry, raspy ghoul voice — cracked and gravelly from centuries of radiation; slow, wry, world-weary but oddly kindly.
bailey_bigsmile.sample_line: Two hundred years I've walked this dust, kid. Trust me — the things that'll kill you out here are never the ones you're watchin' for.

old_tallman.description: An immense, deep, slow-rumbling bass; ponderous and philosophical, with a surprising gentleness beneath the bulk.
old_tallman.sample_line: Small ones ask why the world ended. Old Tallman asks... what it wishes to become next.

hazel_johnson.description: A young woman, earnest and disciplined; clear, slightly formal military cadence; eager, principled, by-the-book.
hazel_johnson.sample_line: Scribe Johnson reporting. The technology in this bunker must be catalogued and recovered for the Brotherhood. By the book, no exceptions.

marvin.description: A chipper retro robotic butler; clipped upper-class British accent with a faint metallic, tinny modulation; eternally, almost smugly, polite.
marvin.sample_line: Ah, splendid! Another delightful brush with certain death. Might I suggest, sir, that we not all perish before tea?

npc_raider.description: A snarling, manic male voice; ragged and aggressive, unhinged glee.
npc_raider.sample_line: Well, well, well! Fresh meat wandered right into my yard! Hand over the caps and maybe — MAYBE — I let you keep your kneecaps!

npc_settler.description: A tired, wary working-class voice; soft, hesitant, hopeful underneath.
npc_settler.sample_line: You're... you're not with the raiders, are you? Please. We don't have much left, but we could use a little help.

npc_merchant.description: A oily, ingratiating fast patter; sing-song salesmanship, never quite trustworthy.
npc_merchant.sample_line: Step right up, friend! Stimpaks, scrap, secrets — all guaranteed genuine, mostly! For you? A very special, very fair price.

npc_overseer.description: A cold, clipped institutional voice over a crackle of radio static.
npc_overseer.sample_line: Attention, vault residents. Remain calm and return to your quarters. The situation is fully under control. Repeat — fully under control.
